name: Steven Tyler

acts.description: Obtained legal guardianship of 16-year-old Julia Holcomb in 1973 to have a relationship with her; she was 16, he was 25

behavior_summary: Obtained legal guardianship of 16-year-old Julia Holcomb from her parents to pursue a relationship with her. She lived with him for years. He discussed it in his autobiography as a romantic story.

notable_works: I Don't Want to Miss a Thing
art.summary: Aerosmith frontman and one of rock's most iconic voices. Walk This Way reshaped hip-hop as well as rock.

verdict.blurb: Convinced a 16-year-old's parents to let him become her legal guardian so he could date her, and wrote about it as a love story. The parents said yes. None of this was okay then either.
